name: Sylvan Blessing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>恵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み
desc: Place 1 card from your hand on either the top or bottom of the Deck, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Sylvan" monster from your hand or Graveyard. It is unaffected by other card effects this turn. Place it on either the top or bottom of the Deck during the End Phase.
eff: Place 1 card from your hand on either the top or bottom of the Deck, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Sylvan" monster from your hand or Graveyard. It is unaffected by other card effects this turn. Place it on either the top or bottom of the Deck during the End Phase.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's field on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck
